title: About Me
text:
Hi, I'm Mo 👋
      
        I'm a platform-focused product leader with 18+ years of experience building and scaling integration
        frameworks, data pipelines, API ecosystems, and shared services infrastructure. I thrive at the
        intersection of deep technical understanding and strategic product thinking.
      
      
        I co-founded Didehbannet ISP in Iran, where I built a proprietary CRM platform with multi-system
        API integrations, supported 50,000+ POS terminal connections, and delivered high-availability services
        at enterprise scale over 18 years. I'm now the Founder & CEO of Mobosoft Inc. in San Diego, building
        cloud infrastructure and API-driven products.
      
      
        I'm currently completing my MS in Business Analytics at UC San Diego – Rady School of Management
        (Dec 2026), adding data science and machine learning depth to my platform engineering background.
        I'm passionate about solving complex integration challenges and building products that scale.
      

      What I work with
      
        Platform & Integration: API Lifecycle Management, Integration Frameworks, Data Pipelines
        Product Management: Roadmapping, Agile/Scrum, Cross-functional Leadership
        Data & Analytics: Python, SQL, Machine Learning, GIS/Mapbox, Business Intelligence
        Infrastructure: AWS/VPS, Cloud Architecture, Linux/Ubuntu, High-Availability Systems
      

      Connect with me
      
        
           LinkedIn
        
        
           mohamad.boroumand@gmail.com
        
        
           858-947-2222

title: Resume
text:
Mohamad Boroumand
      Product Manager — Platform & Integration | Data Pipelines & API Services | UCSD MSBA '26
      
         mohamad.boroumand@gmail.com
         858-947-2222
         San Diego, CA
         linkedin.com/in/mohamad-boroumand
      
    
    
       Download PDF
    
  

  
  
    Professional Summary
    
      Platform-focused product leader with 18+ years of experience building and scaling integration frameworks,
      data pipelines, API ecosystems, and shared services infrastructure. Co-founded Didehbannet ISP, where I
      built a proprietary CRM platform with multi-system API integrations, supported 50,000+ POS terminal
      connections, and delivered high-availability services at enterprise scale. Now completing an MS in Business
      Analytics at UC San Diego (Dec 2026), adding data science and analytics depth to a strong platform
      engineering background.
    
  

  
  
    Skills
    
      
        Platform & Integration
        API Lifecycle Management, Integration Frameworks, Interoperability Standards (HL7/FHIR), Shared Services Architecture, Partner-Facing APIs, Data Pipelines, Reporting Engines
      
      
        Product Management
        Platform Roadmap, Technical Requirements & User Stories, Cross-functional Collaboration, Agile/Scrum, Stakeholder Management, Service-Level Requirements, Continuous Improvement
      
      
        Data & Analytics
        Python, SQL, Data Analytics, Machine Learning, Business Intelligence, GIS/Mapbox, Spatial Analytics, Data Visualization
      
      
        Infrastructure & Compliance
        Cloud Infrastructure (AWS/VPS), Network Architecture, Linux/Ubuntu, Cisco Networking, High-Availability Systems, Security & Compliance (HIPAA/GDPR)
      
    
  

  
  
    Education

    
      
        
          Master of Science, Business Analytics (MSBA) — UC San Diego, Rady School of Management
        
        Jul 2025 – Dec 2026
      
      Data Analytics, Machine Learning, Python, SQL, Business Intelligence, Cloud Computing
    

    
      
        
          DBA, Business Administration & Management — Industrial Management Institute
        
        Feb 2019 – Jul 2022
      
    
  

  
  
    Work Experience

    
      
        
          Founder & CEO · Mobosoft Inc.
        
        Dec 2022 – Present · San Diego, CA
      
      
        Designed and launched cloud infrastructure services including VPS hosting, dedicated servers, and IPv4 resource management — building scalable, high-availability platform foundations.
        Led integration of third-party payment processing APIs and B2B partner systems, managing API lifecycle requirements, service-level expectations, and cross-partner data flows.
        Developed a pay-per-mile EV rental platform from concept through market validation, owning product roadmap, technical requirements, and cross-functional execution.
        Applied data analytics to monitor platform performance and drive continuous improvement in service reliability and operational efficiency.
      
    

    
      
        
          Co-Founder & CEO · Didehbannet ISP
        
        Jul 2004 – Jul 2022 · 18 yrs · Iran
      
      
        Built a proprietary CRM platform from scratch — architected user authentication, automated billing workflows, and API integrations connecting to multiple third-party systems.
        Designed and maintained integration frameworks supporting 50,000+ POS terminal connections, ensuring high-availability data flows and real-time connectivity at enterprise scale.
        Delivered city-scale fiber optic infrastructure, defining platform architecture standards and phased rollout strategy for long-term reliability.
        Deployed a full Wi-Fi platform across Bahonar University, supporting 20,000+ active users with secure, scalable network services and centralized authentication.
        Led B2B partnership negotiations and partner-facing API integrations, translating complex technical requirements into clear product roadmaps.
      
    
  

  
  
    Featured Project
    
      
        
          Campus Foot Traffic & Routing Analysis · UCSD × OccuSpace Capstone
        
        Jan 2026 – Jun 2026
      
      Python · GIS · Mapbox · Spatial Analytics · Data Pipelines
      
        Analyzed anonymized device-level movement data across UCSD campus — building data pipelines, probabilistic zone-to-zone transition models, and reporting visualizations for institutional stakeholders.
        Delivered descriptive, predictive, and prescriptive analytics outputs using real OccuSpace production data, translating complex platform data into actionable insights for non-technical stakeholders.
        Developed interactive GIS dashboards for UCSD Facilities and Campus Planning.
      
    
  

  
  
    Certifications
    
      Introduction to Programming Using Python — Sololearn (Jul 2023)
      Data Analytics — Masterschool (May 2023) · Credential ID: 74262
      Microsoft Excel — LinkedIn Skill Assessment ✓ Verified
